vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

fragment_roles: rows where cust_income_level = G: 130,000 - 149,999 + rows where cust_income_level = D: 70,000 - 89,999
rows where cust_income_level = H: 150,000 - 169,999 + rows where cust_income_level = J: 190,000 - 249,999 + rows where cust_income_level = B: 30,000 - 49,999
rows where cust_income_level = I: 170,000 - 189,999 + rows where cust_income_level = C: 50,000 - 69,999
rows where occupation = Machine + rows where occupation = ? + rows where occupation = Transp.
rows where occupation is NULL or not in {'Crafts', 'Sales', 'Exec.', 'Prof.', 'Cleric.', 'Other', 'Machine', '?', 'Transp.'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
rows where promo_begin_date > 2021-02-28 or is NULL
rows where calendar_month_name = August + rows where calendar_month_name = December
rows where calendar_month_name = January + rows where calendar_month_name = July
rows where calendar_month_name = March + rows where calendar_month_name = May
rows where calendar_month_name = October + rows where calendar_month_name = April + rows where calendar_month_name = June
rows where calendar_month_name is NULL or not in {'August', 'December', 'January', 'July', 'March', 'May', 'October', 'April', 'June'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
times||vfrag=calendar_month_name.fragment_role_A: rows where calendar_month_name = August + rows where calendar_month_name = December
times||vfrag=calendar_month_name.fragment_role_B: rows where calendar_month_name = January + rows where calendar_month_name = July

justification.cross_local_query_count_interpretation: Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
